notes: Python 3.14 failed because tflite-runtime wheel was unavailable.
Use a separate Python 3.11 environment for wake-word development.

install_notes: Install speexdsp-ns from PyPI, not from old hardcoded GitHub wheel URLs.
Noise suppression is optional; wake-word testing can proceed without it.
tflite-runtime compatibility is tied to supported Python versions.

project_context.goal: offline pocket voice assistant for visually impaired users
